_comment: FIX 7 — public read/write because there is NO Firebase Auth in this project. The 'login' is a hardcoded password in JS only (auth.js). FIX 2 — .indexOn entries are required so the orderByChild('ts') queries in realtime.listenDailyProgress / listenHse don't print runtime warnings and stay performant on the free tier. Deploy with: firebase deploy --only database — notifications/.indexOn added for the live bell's orderByChild('ts') query; pod/$date/.indexOn for the live POD feed.
